programme.desc: Billy Beane (Brad Pitt), general manager of the Oakland A's, one day has an epiphany: Baseball's conventional wisdom is all wrong. He recruits bargain-bin players whom the scouts have labeled as flawed, but have game-winning potential. Based on the book by Michael Lewis.

programme.desc: Martin heads to the lush and tropical islands of Hawaii for a look beyond its image as a tourist paradise, and into the havoc wreaked by advancing lava fields and smoking craters.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: Starting at Washington's San Juan Islands, Martin heads to California's Channel Islands. He crosses 2,000 miles to Avery Island, witnessing Louisiana's disappearing coastal communities.

programme.desc: Martin visits Puerto Rico, recovering from Hurricane Maria's devastation. He explores Georgia and Carolina's Sea Islands, home to the Gullah Geechee people preserving African heritage.
